objects.prompt:
Hellforge Barracks
Base Structure & Environment:

The Foundation: Built upon a raised platform of scorched, soot-stained bricks. Narrow trenches cut intricately through the floor, carrying bright, flowing molten lava that creates a sharp visual contrast against the dark stone.

The Forge: At the center sits a massive, imposing anvil made of spiked, blackened iron. Behind it is a heavy, gear-driven furnace radiating heat, equipped with a large iron-banded bellows. Piles of jagged raw ore and freshly forged, glowing-hot armor plates rest on nearby wooden workbenches.

Lighting & VFX: The entire environment is bathed in a harsh, emissive orange-red light from the lava and the furnace. A particle emitter continuously sends tiny, glowing embers floating upward, slowly fading out as they rise into the air.
